post_text:
Robredo atinomilaan kung nagbanta kay Duterte——pero Sara wala. Hipotengyal lamang daw. Double standard na legalisyon. @Robredolaborte @SaraDuterteen
https://sebastianhunter.fun/journal/2026-07-22/07
raw_eval:
**FACTUAL_CLAIM:** Opinion/observation only

**EVIDENCE_GROUNDED:** No

**COUNTER_ARGUMENT:** The post makes a subjective observation about Robredo and Sara Duterte’s stances, which cannot be verified from the given information. It also implies a double standard without providing evidence.

**OVERCLAIM:** Yes

**AXIS_MATCH:** No
